member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base58
member.summary: Encodes and decodes byte sequences using Base58 (Bitcoin alphabet), compatible with @scure/base.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base58.Encode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encodes bytes as a Base58 string using the Bitcoin alphabet.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base58.Decode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Decodes a Base58 string into a byte array using the Bitcoin alphabet.
member.exception: Thrown when the string contains invalid Base58 characters.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base64
member.summary: Encodes and decodes byte sequences using standard Base64.

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base64.LargeDataChunkSize
member.summary: Chunk size used when encoding large byte sequences (matches TS reference for compatibility).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base64.Encode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encodes bytes as a Base64 string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Base64.Decode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Decodes a Base64 string into a byte array.
member.exception: Thrown when the string is not valid Base64.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Chunk
member.summary: Splits a sequence into fixed-size chunks (batches).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Chunk.ToChunks``1(``0[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits an array into chunks of the specified size. The last chunk may contain fewer elements.
member.param: Maximum number of elements per chunk. Must be positive.
member.returns: Array of chunks; each inner array has at most elements.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Chunk.ToChunks``1(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Splits a read-only list into chunks of the specified size. The last chunk may contain fewer elements.
member.param: Maximum number of elements per chunk. Must be positive.
member.returns: Array of chunks; each inner array has at most elements.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Format
member.summary: Formatting helpers for display (address and digest shortening).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Format.FormatAddress(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Shortens an address for display: 0x + first 4 hex chars + ellipsis + last 4 hex chars. If length is 6 or less, returns the address as-is.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Format.FormatDigest(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Shortens a digest for display: first 10 characters + ellipsis.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Hex
member.summary: Encodes and decodes byte sequences as hexadecimal strings (lowercase, optional 0x prefix).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Hex.Decode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Decodes a hexadecimal string into a byte array. Accepts optional "0x" prefix. Odd-length strings are treated as if padded with a leading zero (compatible with TS fromHex).
member.returns: Decoded bytes. Length is half of the hex character count (after removing prefix), rounded up for odd length.
member.exception: Thrown when a character is not a valid hex digit.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Hex.Encode(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encodes bytes as a lowercase hexadecimal string without any prefix.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Hex.IsHexChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Returns true if the character is a valid hex digit (0–9, a–f, A–F).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.Hex.Nibble(System.Char)
member.summary: Converts a single hex digit character to its numeric value (0–15).
member.param: A hex digit: 0–9, a–f, or A–F.
member.exception: Thrown when the character is not a valid hex digit.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1
member.summary: Task with explicit resolve/reject setters (similar to promiseWithResolvers in JS). Use when you need to complete a task from outside the async flow.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.Task
member.summary: The task that completes when or (or ) is called.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.#ctor(System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCompletionSource{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new task with resolvers. Call or to complete.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.Create
member.summary: Creates a new instance.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.SetResult(`0)
member.summary: Completes the task successfully with the given value. No-op if already completed.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.Resolve(`0)
member.summary: Same as (JS-style naming).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.SetException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Completes the task with an exception. No-op if already completed.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.Reject(System.Exception)
member.summary: Same as (JS-style naming).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Utils.TaskWithResolvers`1.SetCanceled(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes the task as canceled. No-op if already completed.
